screenshots.note: Container hit pthread_create EAGAIN — screenshots could not be captured. Code-only analysis from current source.

not_deployed: Speech bubble still clipped by overflow:hidden on office-floor (Office.css line 84) — STRIKE 6
handleCharClick still a plain arrow function, not useCallback — defeats memo() on ALL Characters — STRIKE 5
Arrow-key tab navigation still pushes history entries via window.location.hash = next — STRIKE 3
activityByWorker useMemo creates new array refs on every poll — STRIKE 2
Footer quote counter still wraps to 1 instead of 0 — STRIKE 5
localStorage.getItem in useState initializers still unguarded — STRIKE 4
handleTabKeyDown not wrapped in useCallback — STRIKE 2
Activity filter radiogroups still lack arrow-key navigation — STRIKE 2
Dashboard activity log still passes inline-filtered arrays — STRIKE 2

suggestions.title: handleCharClick is STILL not useCallback — this is strike 5
suggestions.description: Office.jsx line 1248: handleCharClick is a plain arrow function. Every Office render creates a new reference. This is passed to every Character component (line 1568, 1583, 1613). Since Character is memo()-wrapped, the new function ref causes ALL character memo checks to fail on every render. This means every 30s poll re-renders every single character on screen. This has been reported since QA74. Fix: useCallback with deps [setPingedId, setPingReaction, pingTimerRef, pingReactionTimerRef, onWorkerClick].

suggestions.title: Speech bubble clipped — strike 6, never addressed
suggestions.description: office-floor has overflow:hidden (Office.css line 84). Bloberto at top:4% with bubble at bottom:calc(100%+8px) is clipped. This has been reported every review since QA71. Simple fix: move speech bubble inside the overflow boundary or use clip-path: inset(-20px 0 0 0) on office-floor to allow top overflow only.

suggestions.title: Arrow-key tab switching pushes browser history — Back button broken
suggestions.description: App.jsx lines 794/799: handleTabKeyDown sets window.location.hash directly. Each assignment creates a history entry. User presses ArrowRight 5 times → must press Back 5 times to leave page. Fix: history.replaceState(null, '', '#' + next). Also applies to lines 805, 877-878, 1271, 1284.

suggestions.title: localStorage.getItem calls in useState initializers will crash in private browsing
suggestions.description: App.jsx lines 628, 702, 749: localStorage.getItem() called in useState(() => ...). iOS Safari private mode throws SecurityError. App has ErrorBoundary but user sees 'Something went wrong' with no recovery. Fix: wrap in try/catch. A safeRead() helper matching the existing safeSave() pattern.

suggestions.title: activityByWorker creates new array refs every poll — WorkerCard memo defeated
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 955: useMemo runs .filter().slice(-3) per worker. filter() always returns a new ref. Every 30s poll changes activityLog → new refs → all WorkerCards re-render. Fix: compare content before inserting, or use JSON.stringify comparison to stabilize refs.

suggestions.title: Footer quote counter wraps 1→1 — vibe tagline permanently lost
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1448: setQuoteBonus(p => p >= BONUS_TAGLINES.length ? 1 : p + 1). Should wrap to 0 to show vibe tagline again. Strike 5.

suggestions.title: handleTabKeyDown not wrapped in useCallback
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 788: plain function, new ref every render. Passed to both tab buttons' onKeyDown. Minor perf impact but easy fix.

suggestions.title: Activity filter radiogroups violate ARIA contract — no arrow-key navigation
suggestions.description: App.jsx lines 1385/1404: role='radiogroup' with button[role='radio'] children. ARIA spec requires arrow keys to move between options. Keyboard users are stuck. Implement roving tabIndex pattern.

suggestions.title: ProgressBar ETA never updates between progress changes
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 229: ETA computed from Date.now() at render time only. No time subscription. If worker sits at 40% for 30 minutes, ETA label shows same stale value. Fix: add useTimeTick(60000) to ProgressBar.

suggestions.title: standupWorkers.includes uses object reference equality
suggestions.description: Office.jsx line 1572: standupWorkers.includes(occ.worker) relies on reference identity. Will silently break if any normalization reconstructs objects. Fix: .some(sw => sw.id === occ.worker.id).

suggestions.title: Conference table 'last huddle' text at 0.38rem is unreadable
suggestions.description: Office.jsx line 1002: fontSize 0.38rem ≈ 5px. Below legibility threshold. Has been this way since QA77. Bump to 0.65rem or hide behind tooltip.

suggestions.title: vibeCaption aria-live region mounts with content — screen readers may miss it
suggestions.description: Office.jsx line 1524: conditionally rendered div with aria-live='polite'. ARIA spec says live regions should be present before content injection. Keep empty container always mounted.

summary: QA80: Zero QA79 issues have been fixed. 9 carry-overs, 5 of which are on strike 5+. The handleCharClick useCallback gap alone causes every character to re-render on every poll — this is the single biggest performance issue in the app. Score dropped 0.2 to 6.9. Three HIGH items are all small-effort fixes that would meaningfully improve performance and UX.
